positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical central composition featuring a glowing bioluminescent forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a majestic, sprawling root system interwoven with delicate flora and ethereal glowing mushrooms. Implement a deep jewel-tone color palette (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted sharply by luminous cyan and gold accents. The art must have a clean, detailed silhouette, evoking a blend of intricate botanical illustration and mystical stained glass. Use dramatic volumetric lighting and strong rim lighting to define edges. The overall composition must feel centered, graphically impactful, and suitable for a high-quality screen print on apparel, maintaining crisp vector-like clean lines and perfect symmetry. Studio shot, fantasy graphic design, Zentangle style influences, highly detailed, UHD, smooth gradients.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, trademark, messy, low resolution, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, duplicate, cartoonish, grainy, signature, bokeh
